The [[Planet/Legends|planet]] originally known as '''Gelefil''' was an [[Agriworld/Legends|agricultural world]] between [[Ingo/Legends|Ingo]] and [[Boonta/Legends|Ko Vari]]. It was one of seven inhabited planets out of a total of fourteen in the [[Annoo system/Legends|Annoo system]] of the [[Tharin sector/Legends|Tharin sector]] of the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. The main [[Hyperspace route/Legends|hyperspace route]] to the planet was the [[Nimat Corridor]] which passed through the system. It was inhabited by the peaceful, long-lived [[Annoo-dat Blue|Ret]]. The planet was later renamed '''Annoo''' after it was conquered by the [[Annoo-dat Prime|Annoo-dat]].

==History==
In about [[322 BBY/Legends|322 BBY]], the Annoo-dat of neighboring [[Annoo (original)|Annoo]] abandoned their dying homeworld and conquered Gelefil. Within a century, the Ret adopted Annoo-dat culture and they became a single civilization, both species referring to themselves as [[Annoo-dat]] and to Gelefil as Annoo. To distinguish between the two [[Species/Legends|species]], [[Xenobiologist/Legends|xenobiologists]] referred to the Ret as [[Annoo-dat Blue]] and the original Annoo-dat as [[Annoo-dat Prime]], however the Annoo-dat did not use such terminology.

Agriculture on Annoo became highly industrialized on the southern continent (the northern continent remaining much as it always had) and the [[Tra'ang'a]] language of the Ret fell out of use, all Annoo-dat speaking [[Dat-an]].
[[File:AnnooCustoms-DroidsS1E2.jpg|thumb|left|250px|On Annoo, organics and droids were separated on arrival.]]
In about [[27 BBY/Legends|27 BBY]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Ashaar Khorda]] attempted a bloody coup, but he was defeated by the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] forcing him to go into hiding.

During the early years of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], the notorious crime lord, [[Sise Fromm]], had a [[Sise Fromm's stronghold|stronghold]] on Annoo from where the [[Fromm Gang/Legends|Fromm Gang]] plotted the takeover of the other major gangs. At the same time, [[Demma Moll]] and her daughter, [[Kea Moll|Kea]], had a farm complex on the planet and formed a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|resistance cell]] in opposition to the Fromms and the Empire.
